mapper.select: SELECT pt.tag_name AS tagName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM picture_tag pt INNER JOIN user_file uf ON pt.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY pt.tag_name ORDER BY count DESC, pt.tag_name ASC

SELECT pt.file_id AS fileId, pt.tag_name AS tagName, pt.image_type AS imageType FROM picture_tag pt INNER JOIN user_file uf ON pt.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 AND pt.file_id IN
#{fileId}
